languages.text: "На колени, нерадивый червь! Ты изложишь мне все подробности или лишишься головы".

traits.locale_text: "На колени, нерадивый червь! Ты изложишь мне все подробности или лишишься головы".

languages.text: "On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."
languages.original_text: "На колени, нерадивый червь! Ты изложишь мне все подробности или лишишься головы".

traits.locale_text: "To your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or you will lose your head."
"On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."
"On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."
"On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."

languages.text: «¡De rodillas, gusano negligente! Cuéntemelo todo sin dejarse ni un solo detalle o mandaré que le corten la cabeza».
languages.original_text: "On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."

traits.locale_text: «¡De rodillas, gusano negligente! Cuéntemelo todo sin dejarse ni un solo detalle o mandaré que le corten la cabeza».

languages.text: “跪下，你这玩忽职守的蛆虫！给我一五一十地交代清楚，否则你的脑袋就不保了。”
languages.original_text: "On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."

traits.locale_text: “跪下，你这玩忽职守的蛆虫！给我一五一十地交代清楚，否则你的脑袋就不保了。”

languages.text: « À genoux, misérable cafard négligent ! J'exige un rapport circonstancié, faute de quoi vous y laisserez votre tête. »
languages.original_text: "On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."

traits.locale_text: « À genoux, misérable cafard négligent ! J'exige un rapport circonstancié, faute de quoi vous y laisserez votre tête. »

languages.text: "Diz çök ihmalkâr solucan! Bana her ayrıntıyı anlatmazsan kelleni kaybedersin."
languages.original_text: "On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."

traits.locale_text: "Diz çök ihmalkâr solucan! Bana her ayrıntıyı anlatmazsan kelleni kaybedersin."

languages.text: 「お前の膝に伏せろ、怠慢な虫！お前は私にあらゆる詳細を語らねばならぬ。さもなければ、お前は首を落とすことになる。」
languages.original_text: "On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."

traits.locale_text: 「お前の膝に伏せろ、怠慢な虫！お前は私にあらゆる詳細を語らねばならぬ。さもなければ、お前は首を落とすことになる。」

languages.text: "Auf die Knie, fahrlässiger Wurm" Ihr werdet mir jetzt alles erzählen, oder Ihr verliert Euren Kopf."
languages.original_text: "On your knees, you negligent worm! You will recount every detail to me, or else you will lose your head."

traits.locale_text: "Auf die Knie, fahrlässiger Wurm" Ihr werdet mir jetzt alles erzählen, oder Ihr verliert Euren Kopf."
